description.unified: Leaps into the air and deals Physical Damage to enemies in range, stunning them for [1 sec.->5 sec.]

Deals Physical Damage to enemies in range and knocks them back. Reduces Hit enemies' All DEF by 30% and ATK Spd by [65%->500] for [4 sec->20 sec], respectively. When Clause successfully blocks an attack, reduces this Skill's Cooldown by [(added) 0.5 sec.]
Increases All allies' Physical Defense, P.Crit Resistance by [(added) 300], and reduces Physical Damage they take by [35%->25%] for [7 sec->20 sec.] [(removed) Physical Block Chance by 200]

Upon blocking, deals Physical Damage to frontal enemies, decreases ATK of affected targets by [10%->20%] for [5 sec->8 sec] and recovers own Mana by [(added) 300]. When an ally excluding self takes DMG, increases all allies' P.DEF by [(added) 20%] and P.Crit Resistance by [(added) 200] for 5 sec. This effect only activates once every 10 sec. [(removed) your Defense increases by 5%, stacking up to 5 times]

light.unified: Cooldown is reduced by [1 sec.->2 sec.]

dark.unified: In exchange for 1 additional Mana Cost, the skill has a 100% chance to draw the target in.

light.unified: Target takes [30% Physical->25% All] DMG for [4 sec.->10 sec.]

dark.unified: Stuns the enemy for 1 sec. [(removed) On block, cooldown is reduced by 0.5 sec]

light.unified: DEF boost is increased by 40%. [(removed) Mana cost is increased by 1000, cooldown is reduced by 4 sec]

dark.unified: Increases P.Block Chance by [(added) 250] for the duration of Skill. [(removed) Physical Critical Resistance is additionally increased by 400]

light.unified: Increases All DMG the hit target takes by [(added) 20%] for 10 sec and has 10 sec Cooldown. [(removed) On block, the Attack reduction effect is changed to apply 2 stacks]

dark.unified: Reduce an additional 10% of ATK. [(removed) Every 10 sec, when an ally other than yourself is hit, all allies' Physical Critical Resistance is increased by 300 for 5 sec]

description.unified: [Cut Ground] [reduces Cooldown by {0}% per enemy hit and increases Stun duration by 2 sec.->Increases All DMG target receives by {0}% for 10 sec, and recovers own Mana by 400 per every hit enemy.]
[Shield Strike] Reduces [P.DEF of hit enemies by 30% and their P.Crit Resist by {0} for 4 sec.->All Crit Resistance of the affected enemy by 500 and Crit Chance by {0} for 10 sec.]
[Guardian Shield] Upon activation, removes negative effects on self, and DEF boost is increased by {0}%. [(removed) increases effect duration by 4.5 sec]
[Vow of Knights] Upon activation, heals HP by [6%->2%] of Max HP, and increases own P.DEF by {0}% for [ (removed) sec -> 5 sec].

dark.unified: At the beginning of each battle, increases ATK of all allies by [(added) 15%]. This effect can be stacked up to max 3 times and is irremovable. [(removed) Max HP by 10%]

description.unified: Upon casting an active skill 3 times, increases P.DEF and ATK for all allies by {0}% for 15 sec. ATK boost is doubled for the [4 allies with the lowest P.DEF->ally with the highest ATK.]
